emails.subject: Re: Jan & Feb Midcon Invoices
emails.body: These deals were confirmed with Evelyn Monroe at Midcon and they were all on Midcon 92168(pipe) and scheduled on the HPL contract 012-41500-02-015. Midcon's HPL contract is 36-001452-3. Please let me know if there are any other questions regarding these deals. Thanks, Susan. Daren J Farmer 03/29/2000 12:23 PM
